inputs.label: Emails Sent
inputs.businessContext: Total number of emails sent in the campaign

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of emails sent in the campaign
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der in der Kampagne gesendeten E-Mails
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'emails envoyés dans la campagne
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de correos electrónicos enviados en la campaña.

inputs.label: Bounces
inputs.businessContext: Number of emails that bounced (hard and soft bounces)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of emails that bounced (hard and soft bounces)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri dönen e-posta sayısı (sert ve yumuşak geri dönmeler)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der zurückgewiesenen E-Mails (harte und weiche Bounces)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'emails ayant rebondi (rebonds durs et mous)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de correos electrónicos que rebotaron (rebotes duros y blandos).

inputs.label: Opens
inputs.businessContext: Number of emails opened (total opens, not necessarily unique)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of emails opened (total opens, not necessarily unique)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Açılan e-posta sayısı (toplam açılma, benzersiz olmak zorunda değil)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der geöffneten E-Mails (Gesamtöffnungen, nicht unbedingt eindeutig)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'emails ouverts (total des ouvertures, pas nécessairement uniques)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de correos electrónicos abiertos (aperturas totales, no necesariamente únicas).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de clics sur les liens reçus
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de clics en enlaces recibidos

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
